data.body:
Heard a Cake song on the radio today. It’s been a while since I heard them and it got me thinking; Cake is a fascinating band. 

No one DISLIKES Cake. It’s like you can’t…even I like Cake. 

…but all of their songs sound almost exactly the same, don’t they?

It’s weird when you think about it.

data.body:
Waffle House seems like an odd place to teleport to, as well.

I've never been to one so I cannot comment on the quality of the food, but they're known for a) fights, b) staff who fight back (literally), and c) staying open until there's an actual hurricane/blizzard/tornado minutes away.
